name: Flank and Greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the flank steak (½ pound) and onions (2/3 cup, chopped).
2. Combine the seasoned ingredients in a large skillet.
3. Add mixed greens (1 quart) and beef stock (1 pint).
4. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat to low.
5. Cover and simmer until meat is tender, about 20 minutes.
6. Serve hot over cooked rice (1 pint).
Note: Ensure the beef stock is well absorbed before serving.
